commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=038f7f4297b6344a590463ad4215f416fc78537a)
commands.review_summary:
Adds `synthesis` and `metadata` as accepted `wiki_apply` op values, normalizes them to internal mutation names, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +20. Total +32 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main documents and exposes `synthesis`/`metadata` flows, while the `wiki_apply` schema only accepts the internal op names before the PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for the type fix and real behavior proof, so this is not a safe ClawSweeper repair lane while the proof gate remains contributor-owned.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): accept apply op aliases
target.body:
Summary
- Fixes #90303.
- Accept CLI-style wiki_apply op aliases (`synthesis`, `metadata`) alongside the internal names (`create_synthesis`, `update_metadata`).
- Normalize aliases before mutation validation so `synthesis` follows the synthesis path and `metadata` follows the metadata path.
- Add focused regression tests for both aliases.

Behavior Proof
- Before: the `wiki_apply` schema only accepted `create_synthesis` and `update_metadata`, so an agent call such as `{"op":"synthesis","title":"Test Synthesis","body":"Some body text","sourceIds":["sources/example.md"]}` failed schema validation with `ValidationError: op must be equal to constant`.
- After: the schema accepts `synthesis` and `metadata`, and `normalizeMemoryWikiMutationInput` maps them to `create_synthesis` and `update_metadata` before the existing validation logic runs.

Verification
- `pnpm test extensions/memory-wiki/src/apply.test.ts`
  - `Test Files  1 passed (1)`
  - `Tests  6 passed (6)`
- `pnpm lint --threads=8`
  - `oxlint:core` finished
  - `oxlint:extensions` finished
  - `oxlint:scripts` finished

Platform Tested
- macOS arm64, pnpm v11.2.2

Limitations
- This keeps the internal operation names working unchanged; it only adds documented CLI aliases for the tool entrypoint.
target.author: sahibzada-allahyar
